title: atomic-skills Plan frontmatter (schemaVersion 0.1)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of `.atomic-skills/plans/<slug>.md`. Mirrors aideck/src/schemas/project-status.ts:Plan. The `narrative` field of the TypeScript Plan interface lives in the markdown body, NOT frontmatter — so it is not declared here.

planActive.description: Derived focus marker (scripts/reconcile-focus.js): true iff status:'active'. Carried by the `phases` dataSource onto each phase row so the Home timeline scopes to active plans (the dashboard can't join). Never hand-authored.

planTitle.description: Derived denormalization (scripts/reconcile-focus.js): a copy of `title`, carried by the `phases` dataSource onto each phase row so a repeat-grouped widget can label the group with the human plan title instead of the slug (the dashboard can't join). Never hand-authored.

spawnedFrom.description: Fork child→parent edge (degrau 7.5): which plan/phase this plan was forked from, and the fork mode. Additive — non-forked plans omit it. Mirrors aideck Plan.spawnedFrom. Migrated inline from the links.json sidecar by F5/T-003 (fork-fields-inline).

summary.description: Concise one-line human summary of what this phase does — distinct from the longer, technical `goal`. Authored + user-validated when phases are generated (post-decompose annotation; decompose.js format stays frozen per R-ORCH-10). Shown on the dashboard Home timeline. Helps a dev recall each phase + validates the AI's interpretation.

spawnedPlans.description: Fork parent→child edge (degrau 7.5): child plan slugs forked from this phase. Additive — phases without forks omit it. Mirrors aideck PhaseDescriptor.spawnedPlans. Migrated inline from the links.json sidecar by F5/T-003.

reviewGate.description: 0.2 (G2 phase-review gate): the outcome of phase-done's review-code gate for THIS phase, written before the phase is set 'done' (project-transitions.md phase-done step 6/8). Shape only here; the cross-field honesty conditional (done + status:passed ⟹ `at` sha present; done + status:skipped ⟹ `reason` present) is enforced by scripts/validate-state.js GATE-R3, NOT the schema — same reason GATE-R2 lives in JS (keeps the aiDeck TS mirror additive-optional). An absent block on a legacy 'done' phase is tolerated (GATE-R2-consistent); `verify` WARNs on it.

status.description: passed = review-code ran and blocker/critical findings were resolved; skipped = --skip-review with a recorded reason.

mode.description: which review mode ran (a destructive phase runs 'both' per G5).

at.description: the commit sha the review concluded against (post-fix HEAD). Required-when-passed by GATE-R3.

reviewFile.description: path to the persisted review file, when one was written (e.g. .atomic-skills/reviews/<…>.md).

reason.description: why review was skipped. Required-when-skipped by GATE-R3.

allOf.description: Phases inserted mid-plan (with provenance) must articulate WHY via context. Original-materialization phases live without context — their narrative is the plan body.
